name: Abdul Rahman Arhabi
title: Brave Envoy
shortDescription: A brave Kufan who went to the Imam with the letters of the Kufans, accompanied him from Mecca to Karbala, and was martyred.
fullStory:
Abdul Rahman ibn Abdullah al-Arhabi was one of the elders and braves of Kufa. When the people of Kufa decided to write letters to Imam Hussain (AS), Abdul Rahman was one of those who took on the grave duty of delivering them.

He went to Mecca and delivered the letters to the Imam. From then on, he never separated from the Imam and accompanied the caravan of light all the way to Karbala. Abdul Rahman was considered one of the Imam's special and trusted companions.

On Ashura, with firm faith and after seeking permission from the Imam, he rushed to the battlefield. He fought manfully and dealt heavy blows to Ibn Sa'd's army.

Finally, after a valiant fight, he attained the great grace of martyrdom, and his name was recorded among those close to the Divine court and in the Ziyarat al-Nahiya al-Muqaddasa.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلَى عَبْدِ الرَّحْمانِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الأَرْحَبِيِّ...
quote: (Ziyarat al-Nahiya:) Peace be upon Abdul Rahman ibn Abdullah al-Arhabi...
